name: Tandoori Chicken (Tandoori Murgh)
recipeIngredient: 1 2 inch piece fresh ginger root, peeled/grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the grated ginger, garlic, cumin seed, cayenne pepper, salt, and yogurt.
2. Place the chicken pieces in a foil-lined baking pan and pour over the yogurt mixture.
3. Use your hands to coat the meat completely. Leave the chicken to marinate for at least 2 hours, or preferably overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Dribble the oil over the chicken in the baking pan and sprinkle the chicken with turmeric.
5. Place the pan in the oven and bake for about 1 hour, basting frequently with the oil and yogurt marinade from the bottom of the pan.
6. Serve with hot pita bread and lentil dal.
